member.name: M:SistemaNotas.ArchivoService.LeerEstudiantes(System.String)
member.summary: This C# function reads and returns an array of students from a specified file path.
member.param: The parameter "rutaArchivo" is a string that represents the file path where the data of students is stored. This function "LeerEstudiantes" is likely intended to read and parse the data from the specified file to create an array of student objects.

member.name: M:SistemaNotas.ArchivoService.ConvertirLineaAEstudiante(System.String)
member.summary: This C# function takes a string input and converts it into an object of type Estudiante (Student).
member.param: The parameter "linea" in the method "ConvertirLineaAEstudiante" seems to represent a string that contains information about a student. This method likely converts this string into an object of type "Estudiante" (Student).
